query:
-- Insert pricing for DC-001-B004
INSERT INTO variant_pricing (variantId, sellingPriceFobL1, sellingPriceFobL2, sellingPriceFobL3)
SELECT id, 150.00, 160.00, 170.00
FROM product_variants
WHERE variantCode = 'DC-001-B004';

-- Insert pricing for DC-001-B003
INSERT INTO variant_pricing (variantId, sellingPriceFobL1, sellingPriceFobL2, sellingPriceFobL3)
SELECT id, 140.00, 150.00, 160.00
FROM product_variants
WHERE variantCode = 'DC-001-B003';

-- Insert pricing for DC-001-B002
INSERT INTO variant_pricing (variantId, sellingPriceFobL1, sellingPriceFobL2, sellingPriceFobL3)
SELECT id, 155.00, 165.00, 175.00
FROM product_variants
WHERE variantCode = 'DC-001-B002';

-- Insert pricing for DC-001-B001
INSERT INTO variant_pricing (variantId, sellingPriceFobL1, sellingPriceFobL2, sellingPriceFobL3)
SELECT id, 145.00, 155.00, 165.00
FROM product_variants
WHERE variantCode = 'DC-001-B001';
